title: Manufacturing Engineer - H.B. Fuller India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - H.B. Fuller India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
